---
title: "API Reference"
description: "Entry point for the separately published OPALX Doxygen documentation."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

The source-level OPALX API reference is generated and published separately
from this manual. This keeps the curated documentation small while allowing
the API site to follow the source code closely.

[Open the OPALX Doxygen documentation]({{< meta doxygen-url >}})

The API site lives at PSI and is not copied into this Quarto build. Use the
command and element reference in this manual for user-facing input syntax, and
the Doxygen site for C++ classes, functions, and source-level relationships.
